response: TO SOLVE THE FIRST PART, THE FINAL WEIGHT W_F EQUALS W MULTIPLIED BY 0.98 RAISED TO THE POWER OF N. THE SECOND PART REQUIRES N TO BE AT LEAST 136 TO REACH THE TARGET REDUCTION. CHECK YOUR CLOCK OFTEN TO TRACK TIME. LOOK AT THE CLOCK AGAIN TO ENSURE YOU ARE ON SCHEDULE. SET YOUR CLOCK TO REMIND YOU TO START EARLY.
